articles.title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer is now available everyone on Mac - TechCrunch
articles.description: Perplexity's Personal Computer brings AI agents to your Mac, and is now open to everyone.
articles.content:
Perplexity’s Personal Computer, its answer to OpenClaw and other local AI agents, is now available to all Mac users via its desktop app, the company announced on Thursday.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s lawsuit is putting OpenAI’s safety record under the microscope - TechCrunch
articles.description: Elon Musk's legal effort to dismantle OpenAI may hinge on how its for-profit subsidiary enhances or detracts from the frontier lab's founding mission of ensuring that humanity benefits from artificial general intelligence.
